headline: Beverages, Alcohol, and Tobacco Stocks Q1 Highlights: Molson Coors (NYSE:TAP)
summary: As the craze of earnings season draws to a close, here’s a look back at some of the most exciting (and some less so) results from Q1. Today, we are looking at beverages, alcohol, and tobacco stocks, starting with Molson Coors (NYSE:TAP).
